get.description: Returns API availability for load balancers and monitoring.

post.description: Creates a user with the default parent role; password is stored hashed.
Returns access and refresh tokens. Refresh token is stored server-side until logout or expiry.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token and user snapshot.
Sends a 6-digit code (valid 1 minute) when an account with a password exists. Response is always the same to avoid email enumeration.

500.description: Internal server error (e.g. email not configured)

post.summary: Set a new password with email and OTP
post.description: Completes the forgot-password flow using the 6-digit code from email (same email as /forgot-password). Invalidates all refresh sessions for the user.
Requires Bearer JWT. Verifies the current password, sets a new one, and revokes all refresh sessions so the user must sign in again.

400.description: Validation error or no password on account

post.description: Creates an unverified account (or updates one if email was not yet verified), hashes the password, and emails a 6-digit code. Admin cannot register here.

500.description: Internal server error (e.g. SMTP not configured)

post.description: Verifies the code, marks the email verified, returns accessToken, refreshToken, and user. Use the same role as in the registration request.

200.description: Registration successful; includes access and refresh tokens

post.description: For parent, teacher, and student accounts after email verification. Returns accessToken and refreshToken; use /auth/refresh-token and /auth/logout for session management. Admins should use /auth/admin/login instead.

403.description: Wrong login flow (e.g. admin or unverified email)

post.summary: Admin login with email and password
post.description: Returns accessToken and refreshToken (same session pattern as /auth/login).

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Filter by name or email (partial match)

get.description: Returns profile for the authenticated user (e.g. parent-facing shape when permissions apply).
Returns student users whose parentId matches the authenticated user when permitted.

get.summary: Get class of a child user

403.description: Missing class.read permission or child does not belong to parent
Missing class.joinlink.read permission or child does not belong to parent

patch.description: Partial update including optional new password (hashed server-side). Cannot deactivate own account.

delete.description: Sets isActive to false. Cannot target own account.

get.description: Returns a single user by Mongo ObjectId.

post.description: Creates a new role and assigns permissions by permission slugs.

400.description: Validation error or invalid permission slug

get.description: Returns roles with mapped permission slugs.

patch.description: Updates role name and/or permission slugs.

400.description: Validation error or invalid permission slug

get.description: Returns every permission document for building role forms. Requires JWT and role.view.

post.description: Stores an online tuition lead from the public website form (no authentication).

preferredStartAt.description: UTC instant for the preferred first session, as ISO 8601.

ianaTimeZone.description: IANA time zone for the local wall time the parent chose.

countrySlug.description: Country slug from the landing page URL.
